summary: The AI market in May 2026 shows intensifying bubble characteristics: hyperscaler capex confirmed at $700B for 2026 (up from $600B initial projection, ~40% YoY), OpenAI revenue doubled to $25B annualised run rate against $1.5T committed infrastructure spend, and 81% of global VC ($242B of $297B) still floods into AI. Valuation multiples have modestly moderated with S&P 500 forward P/E declining to 21× but CAPE remains extreme at 39×. Grid connection delays worsened to 5–10 year average with 50% of 2026 US data centre capacity at risk. FTC Operation AI Comply escalated to active enforcement with real investigations and settlements in April 2026. Earnings call AI mentions hit a record 60%+ of S&P 500 firms in Q1 2026.

capeRatio.label: CAPE Ratio
capeRatio.description: Cyclically adjusted P/E for US market

sp500ForwardPE.label: S&P 500 Forward P/E
sp500ForwardPE.description: Forward price-to-earnings ratio for S&P 500 (5-yr median 21.1×, 10-yr median 19.8×)

top7StocksPE.label: Top 7 Stocks P/E
top7StocksPE.description: Average forward P/E of the Magnificent 7 tech stocks (range: META ~18× to AAPL ~34×)

vcAiConcentration.label: VC → AI Share
vcAiConcentration.description: Share of global Q1 2026 VC investment flowing into AI ($242B of $297B) — record high

hyperscalerCapexBn.label: Hyperscaler Capex 2026
hyperscalerCapexBn.description: Confirmed 2026 data center / AI capex across major hyperscalers (Amazon $200B, Google $185B, Microsoft $130B, Meta $130B, Oracle $55B) — largest capex cycle in tech history

openAiRevenueBn.label: OpenAI Annual Revenue
openAiRevenueBn.description: Current annualised revenue run rate ($25B as of Feb 2026, doubled from $13B in 2025) vs $1.5T committed infrastructure spend through 2031

gridConnectionDelay.label: Grid Connection Delay
gridConnectionDelay.description: Average delay to connect a large-scale data center to the electricity grid (range 5–10 yrs); ~50% of 2026 US capacity at risk

dataCenterPowerDemandTWh.label: DC Power Demand
dataCenterPowerDemandTWh.description: Global data center electricity consumption (IEA revised estimates; ~3% of global power use by 2030)

aiUnicornsSince2024.label: AI Unicorns (Global)
aiUnicornsSince2024.description: AI-focused companies with $1B+ valuation globally as of early 2026 — ~50% of all new unicorn formation

narrativeSurgeNewbird.label: NewBird AI 1-Day Surge
narrativeSurgeNewbird.description: Allbirds (footwear) rebranded as NewBird AI and surged 582% intraday on zero AI revenue

topStories.headline: Big Tech Q1 2026 earnings confirm $700B hyperscaler capex for 2026 — largest annual tech capex in history
topStories.source: Q1 2026 Earnings Reports (Amazon, Google, Microsoft, Meta)
